task_boundary: Evaluate whether an agent following the agentic-workflow-editing instructions correctly handles compile-lockfile sync requirements when editing .github/workflows/*.md files
scoring_rule: llm_judge - outputs are descriptions of correct agent behavior, not exact-match strings

approved_sources.source: Repository trainer workflow and gh aw compile behavior
approved_sources.fit: Direct primary source for workflow editing rules
approved_sources.notes: The instructions themselves define the rules; test cases exercise compliance scenarios

rejected_candidates.reason: Covers Actions YAML compilation, not gh-aw agentic workflow compilation

mapping_notes: Scenarios are derived from the 4 instruction rules: (1) compile after edit + include lockfile, (2) do not rely solely on hook, (3) hook as enforcement backstop, (4) fix source on compile failure. Each row tests a distinct rule or combination.
